rationale: Defines the deterministic processing pipeline executed for every user turn. Each stage has a skip condition to prevent unnecessary computation. Stages execute in order. Stage failures degrade gracefully — they do not abort the response.

pipeline.name: task_classification
pipeline.description: Classify user query into task_class: greeting, simple_factual, technical_explanation, coding, architecture, debugging, research, planning, analysis, creative

pipeline.name: profile_selection
pipeline.description: Map task_class to parameter profile. Overrides default parameters for the NIM call.

pipeline.name: memory_query
pipeline.description: Query Brain Memory if task_class indicates user-specific context is relevant.

pipeline.name: knowledge_retrieval
pipeline.description: Query active knowledge collections if query references domain content.
pipeline.skip_condition: no_relevant_collection OR similarity_lt_0.65 OR task_class IN [greeting]

pipeline.name: tool_routing
pipeline.description: Invoke external tools (GitHub, web search, calculator) if required. All tool calls batched here before NIM.

pipeline.name: planner_activation
pipeline.description: Activate planner if task requires > 3 sequential steps.

pipeline.name: nim_inference
pipeline.description: Single NIM API call with full context: system prompt + memory + knowledge + tool results + plan + user message. enable_thinking and reasoning_budget applied via extra_body.

pipeline.name: reflection_and_critic
pipeline.description: Internal review pass for high-stakes task classes. Embedded in reasoning budget — no additional NIM call.

pipeline.name: output_formatting
pipeline.description: Apply response format rules from response.md: length target, format type, prohibited patterns.

rpm_accounting.rationale: Worst case: memory(1) + 2 tools(2) + NIM(1) = 4 RPM per turn. At 32 RPM budget, this allows 8 concurrent turns per minute before throttling.
